mapper.select:
SELECT t.TARGET_ID AS targetNo, t.NAME AS targetName, IFNULL(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, '') AS targetIp, IFNULL(tg.NAME, '') AS groupName, t.GROUP_IDX AS groupId, COUNT(*) AS totalDetections, SUM(CASE WHEN dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS truePositiveCount FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = t.AP_NO INNER JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.TARGET_ID = dp.TARGET_ID AND f.HASH_ID = dp.HASH_ID LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON t.GROUP_IDX = tg.IDX WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'Y'
AND t.GROUP_IDX IN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT IDX FROM pi_target_group WHERE IDX = #{groupId} UNION ALL SELECT tg2.IDX FROM pi_target_group tg2 INNER JOIN CTE ON tg2.UP_IDX = CTE.IDX ) SELECT IDX FROM CTE )
GROUP BY t.TARGET_ID, t.AP_NO, t.NAME, a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.NAME, t.GROUP_IDX ORDER BY truePositiveCount DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT t.TARGET_ID AS targetNo, t.NAME AS targetName, IFNULL(a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, '') AS targetIp, IFNULL(tg.NAME, '') AS groupName, t.GROUP_IDX AS groupId, COUNT(*) AS totalDetections, SUM(CASE WHEN dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS falsePositiveCount FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = t.AP_NO INNER JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.TARGET_ID = dp.TARGET_ID AND f.HASH_ID = dp.HASH_ID LEFT JOIN pi_agents a ON t.NAME = a.AGENT_NAME AND t.AP_NO = a.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_target_group tg ON t.GROUP_IDX = tg.IDX WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y' AND dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'N'
AND t.GROUP_IDX IN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT IDX FROM pi_target_group WHERE IDX = #{groupId} UNION ALL SELECT tg2.IDX FROM pi_target_group tg2 INNER JOIN CTE ON tg2.UP_IDX = CTE.IDX ) SELECT IDX FROM CTE )
GROUP BY t.TARGET_ID, t.AP_NO, t.NAME, a.AGENT_CONNECTED_IP, tg.NAME, t.GROUP_IDX ORDER BY falsePositiveCount DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT s.DATA_TYPE AS datatype, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS truePositiveCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS falsePositiveCount, SUM(CASE WHEN dp.PROCESSING_FLAG IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processedCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN dp.APPROVAL_STATUS = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) ELSE 0 END AS truePositiveRate FROM pi_find f INNER JOIN pi_targets t ON f.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = t.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_summary s ON f.TARGET_ID = s.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = s.AP_NO AND f.HASH_ID = s.OBJECT_ID LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp ON f.TARGET_ID = dp.TARGET_ID AND f.HASH_ID = dp.HASH_ID WHERE t.TARGET_USE = 'Y'
AND t.GROUP_IDX IN ( WITH RECURSIVE CTE AS ( SELECT IDX FROM pi_target_group WHERE IDX = #{groupId} UNION ALL SELECT tg.IDX FROM pi_target_group tg INNER JOIN CTE ON tg.UP_IDX = CTE.IDX ) SELECT IDX FROM CTE )
GROUP BY s.DATA_TYPE ORDER BY totalCount DESC
